attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who attacks from early/surviving breaks in final 5-25km, typically on flat-to-rolling stages rather than mountain summits. Excels at solo efforts with diesel engine pacing, holding off organized chases by narrow margins (11-30 seconds).
team_tactics: Minimal team support in attacks — succeeds through individual efforts from breaks. When defending GC positions, relies on teammates (McNulty noted) to close gaps and control pace, but team resources clearly limited for extended defense.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling terrain with technical or lumpy finales. Shows unexpected time trial resilience. Visibly suffers on sustained climbs but can survive short punchy ascents through determination. Exposed on multi-climb mountain stages.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain GC defense beyond 4-5 days when facing repeated mountain stages. Fades badly on final climbs of hard stages. Breakaway wins depend on narrow margins suggesting limited power reserve against organized chases.
key_patterns: Wins from early breaks via late-stage solo attacks (5-25km out), not bunch sprints. (3 instances)
Exceptional determination allows survival over climbs despite visible suffering, extending opportunities. (3 instances)
Successfully defended yellow jersey for 4 days through minimal margins (1-2 seconds), exceeding expectations. (4 instances)
Shows strong tactical awareness: timing attacks during peloton chaos, attacking for KOM while in pink. (2 instances)
Unsustainable intensity: early efforts lead to collapse on subsequent mountain stages. (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: 2021 Dauphiné showed he can exceed expectations briefly (4 days in yellow) but faded badly once accumulated fatigue hit on mountain stages, revealing ceiling for stage race ambitions
